---
title: "Who Are the Internet Voters?"
author: "Serdült, U., Germann, M., Harris, M., Mendez, F. and Portenier, A."
date: 2015-03-01
description: "In: Tambouris et al. (eds.), Electronic Government and Electronic Participation, pp. 27–41. IOS Press"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/placeholder.png
---
